name: A2A Broker Adapter
description: Config-only opt-in surface for standalone A2A broker routing.

baseUrl.label: Broker Base URL
baseUrl.help: Base URL for the standalone a2a-broker service.

edgeSecret.label: Edge Secret
edgeSecret.help: Optional x-a2a-edge-secret header value for protected broker routes.

requester.id.label: Requester ID
requester.id.help: Default x-a2a-requester-id header when OpenClaw calls the broker directly.

requester.kind.label: Requester Kind
requester.kind.help: Default x-a2a-requester-kind header when OpenClaw calls the broker directly.

requester.role.label: Requester Role
requester.role.help: Default x-a2a-requester-role header when OpenClaw calls the broker directly.

operatorEvents.enabled.label: Operator Event Bridge
operatorEvents.enabled.help: Opt-in SSE bridge for broker /a2a/operator/events, surfaced through a2a.monitor.status operatorEvents mode.

wakeOnTask.enabled.label: Wake on Task
wakeOnTask.enabled.help: Opt-in task wake bridge for accepted broker tasks.

operatorEvents.notification.enabled.label: Operator Notification Delivery
operatorEvents.notification.enabled.help: Explicit opt-in for legacy per-worker operator terminal notification delivery. Leave false for broker task-report based round summaries; stale targets are ignored while disabled.

operatorEvents.notification.channel.label: Operator Notification Channel
operatorEvents.notification.channel.help: Destination channel for operator terminal notifications, for example telegram.

operatorEvents.notification.to.label: Operator Notification Target
operatorEvents.notification.to.help: Destination target for operator terminal notifications, for example telegram:<operator-chat-id>.

operatorEvents.notification.accountId.label: Operator Notification Account ID
operatorEvents.notification.accountId.help: Optional channel account id when multiple channel accounts are configured.

operatorEvents.notification.threadId.label: Operator Notification Thread ID
operatorEvents.notification.threadId.help: Optional thread/topic id for notification delivery.
